summary: The revision substantially resolves the R1 reader concerns. The manuscript now states a scoped main claim, foregrounds the weak real-data ranking result, treats the 6-12 month timing as a planning scenario, and presents Chain 7 as the central unresolved architectural boundary.
strengths: The abstract now carries the fixed-threshold recall, re-optimized recall, and cleaned AUC caveats.
The main claim is narrow and testable.
The synchronized review copy no longer contains stale necessity, impossibility, or production-readiness claims.
